title: neoboutonia melleri var. velutina
intro: Neoboutonia melleri var. velutina is a plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family, commonly known as the velvet-leaf Neoboutonia, which is a variant of the Neoboutonia melleri plant. Traditionally, it has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system. Neoboutonia melleri var. velutina can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to be made for its medicinal uses.
